stem: A line in the xy-plane has a slope of 12 and passes through the point (0, -7). The equation y = mx + c defines the line, where m and c are constants. What is the value of m?
rationale: In slope-intercept form y = mx + c, m is the slope of the line. The line has slope 12, so m = 12. (The constant c equals the y-coordinate of the y-intercept, which is -7.)
